name: discord-send
description: Send a message to a Discord channel via webhook URL or Bot API. Supports embeds and markdown.

inputs.name: webhookUrl
inputs.description: Discord webhook URL (use this OR channelId + bot token)

outputs.name: id
outputs.description: Message ID (only available via Bot API)

outputs.name: sent
outputs.description: Whether the message was sent successfully

credentials.label: Discord Bot Token
credentials.description: Discord bot token (only needed if using channelId instead of webhookUrl)
